solutions.solution: According to the information stated in the question, direction diagram can be drawn as follows [diagram shows School -> 4 km -> Right turn -> 3 km -> Right turn -> House 2 km, with compass directions]. Clearly, he started moving towards East initially.

The diagrammatic representation of direction is as shown below [diagram shows two compass roses with 135° rotation]. Clearly, directions are moving 135° clockwise. Hence, North-East will become South moving 135° clockwise.

According to the direction, the direction diagram is drawn as [diagram shows Amit's right-left orientation, Deepak's left-right orientation, with sunrise and Deepak's shadow]. Clearly, Deepak is facing North.
